TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tampya, title = Tampya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tampya} }

S.FORM: Tampya Itiniay i Wulai Cen no New Taipei City ko Tampya a niyaro', 528 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,835 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 42% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 775 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 58% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,060 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, Truku1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tampja itiniaj i wo~u~uɾai ʦən no~u nəw taipəi ʦitj ko~u tampja a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tampya Itiniay i Wulai Cen no New Taipei City ko Tampya a niyaro', 528 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,835 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 42% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 775 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 58% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,060 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, Truku1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tampja itiniaj i wo~u~uɾai ʦən no~u nəw taipəi ʦitj ko~u tampja a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
